    • EDA: Graph-based Features from Spatial Cell Data

Classify graph feature names into thematic groups

Source: R/classifyFeatures.R
dot-classify_graph_features.Rd

Assigns each feature name to one of 14 biologically motivated thematic groups using regex pattern matching. Called automatically by importGraphFeatures when feature_groups = TRUE.

Usage

.classify_graph_features(feature_names)

Arguments

feature_names

Character vector of feature names.

Value

Character vector of group labels, the same length as feature_names. Features that do not match any pattern are labelled "other".

Details

The 14 groups and the naming patterns that trigger them:

global_topology

n_cells, n_edges, mean/std/max/skewness/kurtosis of degree.

cell_type_composition

frac_* — cell-type fractions.

cell_type_mixing

edge_frac_* — fraction of edges between cell types.

neighborhood_radius

mean_deg_rN, mean_mixrN, n_cellsrN — multi-scale (r20/40/80/100) features. per_celltype_graphmean_deg, mean_mix_, std_deg_, std_mix_* without radius suffix.

cell_type_indicator

is_* — binary presence flags.

local_node

degree, mixing_index, local_frac_. voronoivoronoi_ — Voronoi tessellation metrics.

nearest_neighbor_dist

nn_dist_* — inter-cell-type nearest-neighbor distances.

clustering

clustering_coeff_* — local clustering coefficients.

spatial_autocorrelation

morans_I_* — Moran's I statistics.

tumor_architecture

tumor_, invasion_front, interior_tumor, neoplastic_ecc/hull. immune_spatialimmune_, TIL_* — immune infiltration metrics.

network_community

modularity_, n_connected_, celltype_entropy, local_entropy.

network_motif

total_triangles, homotypic_triangles, heterotypic_triangles, homotypic_triangle_frac.

spatial_distribution

features ending in _dispersion or _ratio (not otherwise classified).
